column1: condition2: ori_VIX changes <= 0.8% while forward changes >= 0.25%
condition3: ori_VIX changes >= 6% or ori_VIX changes <= 3% while forward changes >= 0.75% between open (09:00:00) today and close of the previous trading day
condition4: ori_VIX did not change for at least 4 times
condition6: using last next sigma when next term weight >= 50%
condition7: Index level filtering has been triggered for 4 times in a row (2.5%)
condition8: The number of option series used for sigma calculation decreases for at least 15%
